# StdioClientTransport.OnRestart method

Registers a handler invoked with the fresh child after a restart.

```csharp
public IDisposable OnRestart(Action<IChildProcess> handler)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| handler | Invoked with the new child on each restart. |

## Return Value

An IDisposable that unsubscribes the handler.
